title: The One in Every Order — Proclus and the Hidden Grammar of Divine Hierarchy
author: Proclus / Thomas Taylor

body.text: Unity is the condition for anything to be anything at all. Every being is gathered by aone. Every order hangs from ahigher order, suspended like achain of lamps. Ritual is metaphysics enacted — the hinge where thought becomes act.

Every manifold in some way participates unity. For suppose amanifold in no way participated unity: neither the whole of it, nor each of the many of which it consists, will be one. But each of these again will be amanifold, and this will proceed to infinity.

Proclus turns unity into adiscipline of perception. The mind sees many things — names, bodies, events, gods, powers. He asks what allows the many to be gathered at all. Aheap remains mere spill until unity gathers it.

body.caption: Unity in multiplicity — each order suspended from a higher gathering.

body.text: Every thing which is united is one thing; but not every thing which is one is united. For if that which is united participates unity, it is evident that it is both one and not one.

The united thing is acomposition gathered by unity. This distinction protects against two errors: reduction (the symbol is only matter) and confusion (the symbol is identical with the god). The image is aparticipated presence — held by what exceeds it.

body.caption: Participated presence — every level of the cosmos gathered by what exceeds it.

body.text: Every producing cause gives subsistence to things similar to itself, prior to such as are dissimilar.

This is the metaphysical root of correspondence. Causes produce likeness before unlikeness. The lower bears the signature of the higher. Theurgy acts through this law — it gathers what has already proceeded from agod'sseries. Aritual is an ordering of similars.

body.caption: Like calling to like — the law of correspondence as theurgy's inner grammar.

body.text: Every thing which proceeds from any principle, returns according to its being to that from which it proceeds.

Everything proceeds. Everything returns. The soul descends into division, body, time, and fate. But it bears the law of return within itself because it proceeds from ahigher cause. Theurgy activates this law. Prayer, symbol, and sacred action restore the soul to its own direction.
The soul is restored to its own direction. Theurgy awakens what was already inscribed. Ascent is the memory of origin, made active.
